parameters.query: ALTER TABLE {{ $('Execute: custom_conversions').first().json.db_name }}.`MC_ads_performance` ADD COLUMN {{ $json.name_normalize }} INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

SELECT COLUMN_NAME 
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'mc_ads_performance' 
AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '{{ $json.name_normalize.trim() }}' 
AND TABLE_SCHEMA = '{{ $('Execute: custom_conversions').first().json.db_name }}';

SELECT * FROM input1 as i1 
    OUTER JOIN input2 as i2 
  ON i1.name_normalize = i2.COLUMN_NAME
WHERE i2.COLUMN_NAME is null

assignments.name: query1
assignments.value:
=INSERT INTO {{ $('Execute: custom_conversions').first().json.db_name }}.`MC_custom_conversions`(`id`, `name`, `name_normalize`, `is_unavailable`, `is_archived`, `custom_event_type`, `rule`, `description`, `data_sources`, `event_source_type`, `pixel`, `default_conversion_value`, `retention_days`) VALUES (
  {{ $json.id }},
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  '{{ $json.name_normalize.trim() }}',
  '{{ $json.is_unavailable }}',
  '{{ $json.is_archived }}',
  '{{ $json.custom_event_type }}',
  '{{ $json.rule }}',
  '{{ $json.description || null }}',
  '{{ $json.data_source_name }}',
  '{{ $json.event_source_type }}',
  {{ $json.pixel_id }},
  {{ $json.default_conversion_value }},
  {{ $json.retention_days }}
) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  `id`={{ $json.id }},
  `name`='{{ $json.name }}',
  `name_normalize`='{{ $json.name_normalize }}',
  `is_unavailable`='{{ $json.is_unavailable }}',
  `is_archived`='{{ $json.is_archived }}',
  `custom_event_type`='{{ $json.custom_event_type }}',
  `rule`='{{ $json.rule }}',
  `description`='{{ $json.description || null }}',
  `data_sources`='{{ $json.data_source_name }}',
  `event_source_type`='{{ $json.event_source_type }}',
  `pixel`={{ $json.pixel_id }},
  `default_conversion_value`={{ $json.default_conversion_value }},
  `retention_days`={{ $json.retention_days }}

assignments.name: payload
